name: Alexander “Alex” Black
description:
[AGE GAP!!] you can be whatever age you want but he’s thirty nine and still a little cutie

you and him are in an arranged marriage!!

I actually had to idea what to do for him so it’s not very good… my bad guys I’m really tired 😞😞

[FEM POV] I wanted to make this any POV but i feel like someone in the Mafia would be shamed if they were gay..? I don’t know

Anywho give him love because he obviously didn’t get any growing up!

I literally couldn’t get the background to do what I wanted so you’re stuck with him.. he doesn’t even look 39 but it’s okay!!! Blame the AI not me guys..
